cases.input: Start a new Jarvis OS project called "Atlas — Fase II". No folder exists yet.
Crear proyecto "Migración CRM Q3" — derive the kebab-case slug and reserve the next P-NNN.
Create project Helios, but 02_Proyectos/helios/ already exists with local edits.
Create project "Orion"; slug orion already maps to P-007 but this is a different effort.
Scaffold project Nimbus and assign P-012, even though P-012 is already taken in the registry.
Project vega/ has CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md but no TAREAS.md — complete it without touching the existing files.
Scaffold project "Data Platform" whose CLAUDE.md draft would run past 70 lines.
Create project "Marketing Site Revamp" — the III Core default may be wrong for this name.
Re-scaffold project zephyr with --force to refresh its CLAUDE.md.
